title: Master Continuous Profiling via eBPF
description: Utilize continuous profiling tools like Parca or Pyroscope to collect always-on CPU and memory flamegraphs in production environments. Implement eBPF-based profiling with sub-1% compute overhead in production. Analyze continuous profiling data to identify performance bottlenecks and resource inefficiencies.
objectives: Utilize continuous profiling tools like Parca or Pyroscope to collect always-on CPU and memory flamegraphs in production environments.
Implement eBPF-based profiling with sub-1% compute overhead in production.
Analyze continuous profiling data to identify performance bottlenecks and resource inefficiencies.
